violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving in walk in cooler, refrigerator, & freezers need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cabinets/counters/shelving in kitchen need cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walls/floor/ceiling in walk in cooler needs cleaning. Mold growth.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Water damaged floors in walk in cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cabinets/counters/drawers/silverware containers need cleaning.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Large equipment was not sanitized in place as required. Mold growth in walk in cooler.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Walk in cooler compressor draining onto floor at time of inspection. Typically drains into bucket. Walk in cooler compressor drain line not plumbed correctly.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Popcorn style ceiling in kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning in walk in cooler and kitchen areas.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Walk in cooler floor has excessive water damage/sagging.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. South door not fitted with self closing door mechanism.
